debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
H : ∃ N, ∃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN ≠ {N}
⊢ @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B hB hB' hB'' < D

proof:
by
  apply (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'').lt_of_ne
  intro h_eq
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, hNE⟩
  have h_subset : B N hN ⊆ D.carrier := by
    rw [← h_eq]
    exact (Set.subset_iUnion (B N) hN).trans (Set.subset_iUnion (λ N => ⨆ hN, B N hN) N)
  have h_val : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
  have h_N_in : N ∈ B N hN := by
    by_contra h_notin
    have h_disj := D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN h_subset h_notin
    rw [← h_val] at h_disj
    exact D.not_bot_mem (h_disj.eq_bot_of_le le_rfl ▸ hN)
  apply hNE
  apply Set.Subset.antisymm
  · intro x hx
    by_contra h_ne
    have h_disj := D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup (h_subset hx) (Set.singleton_subset_iff.mpr hN) h_ne
    rw [sSup_singleton] at h_disj
    exact hB'' N hN (h_disj.eq_bot_of_le (h_val.symm ▸ le_sSup hx) ▸ hx)
  · exact Set.singleton_subset_iff.mpr h_N_in
successful_attempts:
by
  apply (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'').lt_of_ne
  intro h_eq
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, hNE⟩
  have h_subset : B N hN ⊆ D.carrier := by
    rw [← h_eq]
    exact (Set.subset_iUnion (B N) hN).trans (Set.subset_iUnion (λ N => ⨆ hN, B N hN) N)
  have h_val : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
  have h_N_in : N ∈ B N hN := by
    by_contra h_notin
    have h_disj := D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN h_subset h_notin
    rw [← h_val] at h_disj
    exact D.not_bot_mem (h_disj.eq_bot_of_le le_rfl ▸ hN)
  apply hNE
  apply Set.Subset.antisymm
  · intro x hx
    by_contra h_ne
    have h_disj := D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup (h_subset hx) (Set.singleton_subset_iff.mpr hN) h_ne
    rw [sSup_singleton] at h_disj
    exact hB'' N hN (h_disj.eq_bot_of_le (h_val.symm ▸ le_sSup hx) ▸ hx)
  · exact Set.singleton_subset_iff.mpr h_N_in
